title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations, psychiatric case management and assessment, and medication management. Other services include family therapy, individual therapy, parenting support, school consultation and support and home-based services. 15455 NW Greenbrier Parkway Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (503) 258-4381 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 258-4381 FAX (503) 872-0659 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake and eligibility screening FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 52 and 57 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Family Counseling Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Psychiatric Case Management If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON
